name: CellDx-Tissue
summary: FDA-cleared comprehensive genomic profiling assay for solid tumors (517 genes, DNA+RNA). Tissue-based CGP test. Datar already tracked in DB as ecd-26 (Trucheck Intelli, a separate liquid biopsy product).

name: Caris ChromoSeq
summary: Whole genome tumor profiling assay for myeloid malignancies (AML, MDS, MPN). >200X depth of coverage, ~1.6B reads per patient. MolDX approved. Hematologic CGP — evaluate if in scope.

name: FoundationOne MRD
summary: Tumor-informed MRD test combining whole-genome sequencing + digital PCR for structural variant detection. Built on SAGA Diagnostics platform (acquired by Roche/FMI April 2026 for $595M). Medicare-covered for early-stage breast cancer. TAT: 2-3 weeks initial, 1-3 days follow-up. Distinct from FoundationOne Tracker MRD (mrd-10) which uses a different approach.

name: Caris MI Clarity
summary: AI-powered prognostic test for HR+/HER2-, node-negative, postmenopausal early-stage breast cancer. Predicts both early (0-5 yr) and late (5-15 yr) distant recurrence risk using computational pathology on H&E slides. Results in 3 business days. Competes with Oncotype DX (tds-19).

name: TOBY Urine MCED
summary: First urine-based multi-cancer early detection (MCED) test to receive FDA Breakthrough Device Designation. Analyzes volatile organic compounds (VOCs) in urine using spectroscopy and machine learning. Very early stage — no PMA filed.
